note: Archetype traversal route on facility (Phase B, FID-0031/D4). Bond walks forward, strafes right, then turns (GE007_AUTO_FORWARD/RIGHT/CRIGHT baked into the captured OSContPad stream) with the level intro skipped (replay_env) so the movement window exercises the level geometry/collision sim. Deterministic under the determinism envelope + replay_env: record==replay1==replay2 (sim_state_hash byte-exact, verified across independent recordings). The ares-free determinism half of the facility gate:true route; the ares trace comparison is the manual oracle step (movement_oracle_capture.sh --route facility_traverse). Regenerate only via scratchpad/finalize_archetype_tapes.sh. Gated by tools/fidelity/gate_routes_smoke.sh + tools/fidelity/tape_regression.sh. Re-baselined 2026-07-11 (4ed9aef564de2c66->5e6f587216bf253c) for FID-0014: the faithful WAYMODE_MAGIC patrol semantics (default ON) freeze unseen patrolling/gopos guards and pad-warp them per retail chrTickBeams US 0x7F020EF0 / chrlvTravelTickMagic US 0x7F028600, so offscreen patroller positions (sim state) differ from the legacy creep-walk. GE007_NO_PATROL_MAGIC_FIX=1 reproduces the previous hash 4ed9aef564de2c66 byte-identically (verified on this tape). See docs/fidelity/derivations/FID-0014-patrol-magic.md. Re-baselined 2026-07-12 (5e6f587216bf253c->99a5e36079952318) for FID-0046: the effect-buffer zero-init (default ON, initexplosioncasing.c) zeroes g_ExplosionBuffer free-slot dead words (parts[].pos/size/rot, read only when frame>0) that this level's file-load left non-zero in the hashed pool region. Gameplay is byte-identical -- the words are dead memory the game never reads; screenshots are identical fix-ON vs fix-OFF. GE007_NO_EFFECT_BUF_ZERO_INIT=1 reproduces the prior hash 5e6f587216bf253c byte-identically (opt-out A/B verified across 3 runs). See docs/fidelity/ledger/FID-0046.json. Re-baselined 2026-07-19 (99a5e36079952318->6676c7d05c662d57) for FID-0132: the collision-hull builder sub_GAME_7F03ECC0 now stores the retail (unclamped) hull vertex count on the collision_data-backed object/door path (rect==&data->unk04, spare words unk24..unk40 are the retail overflow slots); the FID-0096 clamp-to-4 remains only on the bare-rect4f tank path. The old unconditional clamp dropped real hull corners for thin/near-axis-aligned box footprints (degenerate collision polygons -> broken point-in-polygon -> object grounding errors, e.g. the Dam control-room monitors floor-snapping 93 units below their desks; 116 spurious-degenerate footprints across dam/facility/archives/streets -> 0). Corrected footprints change object collision/grounding sim state on every object-bearing level. GE007_NO_HULL_CORNER_FIX=1 reproduces the prior hash 99a5e36079952318 byte-identically (verified on this tape on the fixed binary). Faithful sim change, not a regression. Corpus ctest hull_builder guards the geometry. See docs/fidelity/ledger/FID-0132.json.
